RunningAppsList.Tap on an app below to start it: Tap on an app below to start it.

SettingsPage.Use the phone's microphone instead of th: Use the phone's microphone instead of the glasses' microphone (if applicable).
SettingsPage.Always show the time, date and battery l: Always show the time, date and battery level on your smart glasses.
SettingsPage.Configure the contextual dashboard and H: Configure the contextual dashboard and HeadUp settings.
SettingsPage.Adjust brightness, auto-brightness, and: Adjust brightness, auto-brightness, and other display settings.

PrivacySettingsScreen.Allow AugmentOS to forward your phone no: Allow AugmentOS to forward your phone notifications to your smart glasses.
PrivacySettingsScreen.Allow AugmentOS to display your calendar: Allow AugmentOS to display your calendar events on your smart glasses.
PrivacySettingsScreen.To revoke calendar permission: To revoke calendar permission, please go to your device settings and modify app permissions.

DashboardSettingsScreen.Adjust the angle at which the contextual: Adjust the angle at which the contextual dashboard appears when you look up.

ScreenSettingsScreen.Adjust the brightness level of your smar: Adjust the brightness level of your smart glasses.
ScreenSettingsScreen.Please connect your smart glasses first: Please connect your smart glasses first.
ScreenSettingsScreen.Brightness control not supported for thi: Brightness control not supported for this device.
ScreenSettingsScreen.Automatically adjust the brightness: Automatically adjust the brightness of your smart glasses based on the ambient light.

DeveloperSettingsScreen.Bypass Voice Activity Detection in case: Bypass Voice Activity Detection in case transcription stops working.
DeveloperSettingsScreen.These settings may break the app: Warning: These settings may break the app. Use at your own risk.
Override the default backend server URL. Leave blank to use default.
DeveloperSettingsScreen.Please enter a URL or reset to default: Please enter a URL or reset to default.
DeveloperSettingsScreen.Please enter a valid URL starting with: Please enter a valid URL starting with http:// or https://
DeveloperSettingsScreen.Custom backend URL saved and verified: Custom backend URL saved and verified. It will be used on the next connection attempt or app restart.
DeveloperSettingsScreen.The server responded, but with status: The server responded, but with status {{status}}. Please check the URL and server status.

NotificationServiceUtils.AugmentOS needs permission to read your:
AugmentOS needs permission to read your phone notifications to display them on your smart glasses.

On the next screen:
1. Find "AugmentOS Manager" in the list
2. Toggle the switch to ON
3. Tap ALLOW when prompted
NotificationServiceUtils.Could not open notification settings: Could not open notification settings. Please enable notification access manually in your device settings.
NotificationServiceUtils.There was a problem checking notificatio: There was a problem checking notification permissions. Please try again later.
